About MatthewResume

Leanpub.com

Apr 4, 2021

Leanpub.com

I visit LeanPub.com often and am so amazed every time.

Not only are their some good reads mainly of the titles are Free. Great books from Jeff Leek or Roger Peng from Johns Hopkins Uni. for free. Jeff Leek and Roger Peng are Bioinformatics gurus and teach data science. Roger has a Stats/Science podcast too called Simplystatistics.

Books on Elements of Data Analytic Style and R Programming for Data Science by Roger Peng. and even machine learning This publisher has become The Technical bookstore stop.

For the beginner you can find tons of free or five dollar titles:

  • OpenIntro Statistics,
  • Introduction to Data Science by Rafael Irizarry
  • Statistical Inference for D.S.,
  • Tidyverse Skills for Data Science in R, with some great illustrations.

LeanPub allows one to write in Markdown. This version of markdown varies from GitHub markdown so becareful, but that is minor. Being an R enthusiast, I am able to write Markdown docs then RMarkdown scientific notebooks inside RStudio IDE and present nice text as well as Latex or mathematical formulas. There is cool series of books using the Prefix “JUST ENOUGH”. So you can find How to write books and publish on Leanpub.com, for example, Just Enough Co-Authoring in Leanpub

I highly recommend Leanpub.com

Matthew Curcio, M.Sc.
